message: Jasia, your sister Sunny has vanished. Will you search for her?
Speak with your mother Nymph in the throne room. The servants may also know something.
Your father waits with me in the throne room. Ask the castle folk what they saw.
My lady, your father wishes to speak with you. He waits in the throne room with your mother.
You should speak with the maid first.

After the castle interviews, I recall Sunny went to the Witch in the swamp.
The swamp witch shares vision 1 of four: Sunny sought the drow shaman.
The swamp witch shares vision 2 of four: Sunny sought the drow shaman.
The swamp witch shares vision 3 of four: Sunny sought the drow shaman.
The swamp witch shares vision 4 of four: Sunny sought the drow shaman.
Sunny wished to speak with Lloth. Bring nine reagents and I will send you to her.
Go to Lloth.
You amuse me, wood elf. Settle the dragon dispute and I will tell you of Sunny.
Sunny wanted drow form and magic. She cast a tent spell on a ring, lost it, and vanished.

You dare confront me?
Hybrid drow guarding a tent by the dow mountain will let anyone wearing the ring pass.
Show the ring if you wish to pass.
Sister... I became a demi-god and left the mortal realm. Take my blessing.
You found her! The kingdom is in your debt.

All moon pacts are sealed. Sunny will meet you at the ring entry.
The ring realm hums with old magic.
Royal steel for the princess's champion.
Potions brewed for the search.
